name: Smart Model Router
description: Routes prompts to Haiku or Sonnet based on complexity classification using local Ollama

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, message: 'Classifying and routing...' }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const classifyResult = $json; const complexity = classifyResult.complexity || 'complex'; const chosenModel = classifyResult.model || 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6'; const agentForModel = chosenModel.includes('haiku') ? 'automation' : 'fredrick'; return [{ json: { complexity, chosenModel, agentForModel, prompt: $json.prompt || $input.all()[0].json.message || '', sessionKey: $input.all()[0].json._openclaw?.sessionKey || $input.all()[0].json.sessionKey || '' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tool: 'sessions_send', args: { sessionKey: $json.sessionKey, message: $json.prompt }, _openclaw: { agentId: $json.agentForModel } }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const agentResponse = $json.result || $json; const complexity = $input.all()[1].json.complexity; const chosenModel = $input.all()[1].json.chosenModel; return [{ json: { result: agentResponse, summary: 'Routed to ' + chosenModel + ' (' + complexity + ')', routingDecision: { complexity, model: chosenModel, agent: $input.all()[1].json.agentForModel } } }];

meta.description: Smart model router: classifies prompt complexity using local Ollama, routes to Haiku (cheap) or Sonnet (powerful), then sends result back.
